desc: Full jumpscares compilation from Security Breach including all animatronics and ending cutscenes.

desc: Battington's iconic FNAF VHS analog horror series remaking the original Squimpus McGrimpus tapes with terrifying animations.

desc: Extended 1-hour ambience from Five Nights at Freddy's 1, perfect for sleep or studying with the iconic pizzeria atmosphere.

desc: The iconic power-out ambience from FNAF 1, featuring the eerie Surreal Ominous Background track that plays when Freddy's Toreador March begins.

desc: Fazbear's Fright security office ambience from FNAF 3, capturing the horror attraction's unsettling atmosphere.

desc: Extended FNAF ambience collection featuring sounds from the original games, great for background atmosphere.

title: FNAF Movie Animatronics Jumpscare & Workshop Animations
desc: Behind-the-scenes look at the practical animatronics from the Five Nights at Freddy's movie, showing jumpscare animations and workshop footage.

title: FNAF SECURITY BREACH - Full Game Walkthrough Gameplay No Commentary
desc: Complete no-commentary walkthrough of FNAF Security Breach, exploring Freddy Fazbear's Mega Pizzaplex and surviving until 6AM.

desc: Full game walkthrough of Security Breach without commentary, showing all探索 areas, stealth encounters, and story progression.

desc: VR gameplay of FNAF Help Wanted, the virtual reality compilation of mini-games from across the Five Nights at Freddy's series.

desc: Complete walkthrough of the Security Breach: Ruin DLC playing as Cassie, exploring the dilapidated Pizzaplex in search of Gregory.

desc: Game Theory's comprehensive FNAF timeline explanation, breaking down the complete lore from Fredbear's Family Diner to modern games.

desc: Massive 200+ jumpscares compilation spanning every FNAF game from 2014 to 2026, including main titles, spin-offs, and fan projects.
